projectDescription: A Twitch enhancement suite and add-on framework that provides custom emotes, badges, chat filtering, and a powerful plugin system for extending Twitch's functionality.
keyFeatures: Custom emotes from FrankerFaceZ emote library
Custom chat badges for supporters and channel owners
Advanced chat filtering and keyword highlighting
Modular add-on system for third-party extensions
Chat message tokenizer pipeline for custom rendering
Real-time socket communication with FFZ servers
I18n/localization support with ICU message format
Experiment system for staged feature rollouts
Browser extension and userscript deployment modes
publicApiSurface: Module (utilities/module) — base class for all FFZ modules and add-ons
Addon (utilities/addon) — subclass of Module for add-on root modules
Addon.register() — registers an add-on with the FFZ module system
Module.inject() — declares and resolves module dependencies
EventEmitter (utilities/events) — typed event emitter with Detach/StopPropagation
SettingsManager (settings/index) — profile-based settings with type handlers
AddonManager (addons.ts) — manages loading, enabling, and disabling add-ons
FrankerFaceZ.utilities — static namespace exposing addon, color, dom, events, filtering, i18n, logging, module, object, time, tooltip utilities
FrankerFaceZ.get() — returns the singleton FrankerFaceZ instance
Chat module (modules/chat) — emotes, badges, tokenizers, rooms, users, actions
Emotes module (modules/chat/emotes) — emote sets, modifier flags, rendering
Badges module (modules/chat/badges) — Twitch and custom badge management
createTester() (utilities/filtering) — builds a context-aware filter test function
